verse_text: 'Therefore, behold, days are coming,' says the Lord, 'when I will sow Israel and Judah with the seed of man and the seed of cattle.

links.context: In the OT, metaphors of sowing and harvesting are common ([[PSA.125:5]]; [[JER.38:27]]- 30; [[HOS.2:21]]-23; [[JOL.3:12]]-14), as this was a part of daily life. Here, Jesus reveals Himself as the promised Messiah, the sower in the earth, who had been foretold in Is 55:10-13.
